steps.t: Yonder-watch supplies can be found at the secret store-hole in the woods between Gamwich and Long Cleeve. You should carry Yonder-watch supplies to Sa…
Salga Greengrass can be found in Nobottle. You should talk to Salga Greengrass in Nobottle.
Harry Goatleaf can be found near Nobottle in the Yondershire. You should confront Harry Goatleaf.
Fredegar Bolger can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should talk to Fredegar Bolger in Nobottle.
